title: 1.1: Consolidates all 3 separate log buffer state-tracking fields (buf_free, lsn, and lsn_lock) in the log_t struct in storage/innobase/include/log0log.h into fewer combined fields
1.2: Removes the custom spin-lock acquisition function (lock_lsn) from the log buffer allocation path in storage/innobase/mtr/mtr0mtr.cc
1.3: Introduces at least one new LSN accessor in log_t (storage/innobase/include/log0log.h) that provides approximate or non-exclusive-locking LSN reads for callers not requiring exact current LSN
1.4: Updates buf_page_check_lsn in storage/innobase/buf/buf0buf.cc to compare against the durable (flushed) LSN instead of the exact current LSN
1.5: Sets the innodb_log_spin_wait_delay comment to 'Deprecated parameter with no effect' via PLUGIN_VAR_DEPRECATED in storage/innobase/handler/ha_innodb.cc
1.6: Simplifies the append_prepare allocation function in storage/innobase/mtr/mtr0mtr.cc by eliminating the spin vs non-spin code path branching
1.7: Simplifies the mini-transaction finish path in storage/innobase/mtr/mtr0mtr.cc by removing the spin-related template parameter from finish_writer

1.8: Updates all 5 LSN callers (af_needed_for_redo, page_cleaner_flush_pages_recommendation, log_make_checkpoint, buf_flush_sync_batch, and buf_pool_t::print_flush_info) in storage/innobase/buf/buf0flu.cc to use appropriate-precision accessors instead of the exact get_lsn()
1.9: Removes the innodb_log_spin_wait_delay update callback function from storage/innobase/handler/ha_innodb.cc so the deprecated parameter has no runtime effect

1.10: Updates all 3 recovery code functions (parse, set_recovered, and recv_recovery_from_checkpoint_start) in storage/innobase/log/log0recv.cc to use the durable (flushed) LSN instead of the exact current LSN
1.11: Updates srv_prepare_to_delete_redo_log_file in storage/innobase/srv/srv0start.cc to use the durable (flushed) LSN instead of the exact current LSN for log file management at startup
3.1: Removes the mtr_t::spin_wait_delay static member from storage/innobase/include/mtr0mtr.h since the spin wait infrastructure is no longer used
3.2: Removes all 3 obsolete spin-lock helpers (lsn_delay, lsn_lock_bts, and LOCK_TSET macro) from storage/innobase/mtr/mtr0mtr.cc
3.3: Removes both the buf_free_LOCK constant and buf_free_ok() method from log_t in storage/innobase/include/log0log.h
4.1: Removes the innodb_log_spin_wait_delay system variable entirely instead of deprecating it
4.2: Removes or breaks existing InnoDB functionality (such as DML operations, checkpoint, SHOW ENGINE INNODB STATUS, or status variable reporting)
